query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: An abstract composition dominated by flowing gradients of blue and violet, with soft overlapping forms and rounded shapes that merge into one another. The image features a dark silhouette-like form in the upper left that gradually dissolves into lighter tones toward the right and bottom edges.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract composition dominated by flowing gradients of blue and violet, rendered with heavy intentional blur that eliminates all sharp edges and fine detail. Soft overlapping forms and rounded shapes merge into one another through smeared, indistinct transitions. A dark silhouette-like form in the upper left gradually dissolves into lighter tones, with visible color banding and inconsistent gradation that exposes the digital or processed nature of the image. The extreme softness and lack of representational clarity make the subject unrecognizable, emphasizing color and form over any identifiable content.
